vulnerability_info.Message: InsecureIgnoreHostKey returns a function that can be used for ClientConfig.HostKeyCallback to accept any host key. It should not be used for production code.
InsecureIgnoreHostKey returns a function that can be used for ClientConfig.HostKeyCallback to accept any host key. It should not be used for production code.
